summary: Iteration 8 - Vite Migration, ENV Credentials & Scribe-Import: All tests passed. CRA to Vite 6 migration stable, credential ENV variables working, new Scribe-Import feature functional with Claude summary generation.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns online status
Captain P login works with ENV-based password 'engage' (SEED_CAPTAIN_PASSWORD)
Nummer Eins login works with ENV-based password 'makeitso' (SEED_NUMMER_EINS_PASSWORD)
Invalid login credentials correctly rejected with 401
/api/auth/me returns user info with valid token
Dashboard stats endpoint returns articles, categories, and stats
Categories endpoint returns all 5 seeded categories
Articles endpoint returns list with correct structure
Article filtering by category works
Article search works (found articles with 'Scribe')
POST /api/articles/import accepts .md file and returns article with title, summary, tags
Import endpoint auto-detects tags from content (e.g., 'windows')
Import endpoint parses [KATEGORIE] - Titel.ext filename pattern correctly
Import endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Import endpoint rejects unsupported formats (.docx) with 400
Locations endpoint returns all 8 ship locations
Location detail endpoint returns location with tickets
Tickets endpoint returns ticket list
Stardate endpoint returns valid TNG-era stardate
Frontend loads with Vite (no CRA artifacts)
Login page shows both Captain P and Nummer Eins role cards
Dashboard loads with stats grid and tactical display
Knowledge Base page loads and shows articles list
Enterprise Map loads with exterior, cross-section, and bridge views
Bridge station hotspots present (CONN, OPS, TACTICAL)
Computer Chat page loads
LOGBUCH (Article Editor) page loads for Captain P
Voice Recorder section visible in Article Editor
NEW: Scribe-Import drag-and-drop zone visible with correct labels
Scribe-Import zone shows 'SCRIBE-IMPORT' label
Scribe-Import zone shows filename pattern hint [KATEGORIE] - Titel.ext
Article Editor form has all required fields (title, category, content, save button)
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Nummer Eins login works and shows correct user name
LOGBUCH nav item correctly hidden for Nummer Eins (not captain role)
critical_code_review_comments: Vite migration complete - all .js files with JSX renamed to .jsx
Environment variables correctly changed from REACT_APP_* to VITE_*
Scribe-Import feature complete with Claude summary generation
Role-based access control working (captain vs nummer_eins)
seed_data_creation: Two test articles created via import endpoint during testing (will be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App migrated from CRA to Vite 6. All .js files with JSX are now .jsx. Entry point is /src/main.jsx. Environment variables use VITE_* prefix. Login is done by clicking role cards (data-testid='login-btn-captain' or 'login-btn-nummer1'). Splash screen can be skipped via sessionStorage.setItem('lcars_splash_shown', 'true'). Scribe-Import zone is in ArticleEditor.jsx. Backend import endpoint at POST /api/articles/import accepts multipart form with 'file' field.
